extraction.text:
{CorporationName}
                                         (the "Corporation")

 Policy Name:                  {PolicyName}

 Policy Number:                {PolicyNumber}

 Effective Date:               {PolicyEffectiveDate}

 Donation receipts will only be issued once the gift is the legal property of the Corporation. The
 Treasurer or Executive Director/CEO signs donation receipts. Receipts will be issued within one
 month of receipt by the Corporation.

 Donation receipts will include the following information:

       Name and address of the donor

       Name and address of the Corporation

       Date gift was received

       Corporation's charitable registration number

       Website address of the Canada Revenue Agency

       Amount of donation

       Description of donation if in-kind (i.e. non-cash)

 If a donor wants to make a donation to a specific fund or to a specific general field of interest
 fund, there should be documentation that they are making a gift to that fund. This may simply be
 a note accompanying the gift that it is being made to a particular fund. You don't necessarily need
 (or want) a formal agreement with the donor or a formal donor designation. The reason is that
 the terms of that fund are not being set by the donor, they are set by the existing terms of the
 fund.

 Donation receipts for gifts of securities are based on the value of the securities at the close of
 trading on the day in which the ownership is transferred from the donor to the Corporation.
 Supporting documentation in writing must verify this valuation.

 One copy of the donation receipt, filed in numerical order, will be held for seven years. This can
 be an electronic copy. One copy of the receipt for a gift to an established fund will be kept in the
 fund file.

 Donation receipts for special events will be in accordance with regulations of the Charities
 Directorate of the Canada Revenue Agency.

 Monitoring:                   This policy will be reviewed on or around {ReviewDate}.


Policy {PolicyNumber} - {PolicyName} - {CorporationName} - {PolicyEffectiveDate}
 Board Acceptance:             This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors
                               of the Corporation on {EffectiveDate}, as confirmed by
                               {#SoleVotDir}the signature of the sole director of the
                               Corporation below.{/SoleVotDir}{#MultiVotDir}the
                               counterpart signatures of each of the directors of the Corporation
                               below.{/MultiVotDir}

 {#VotingDirectors}


 {SignerTag}
 _________________________________________
 {Director-Name}{/VotingDirectors}


Policy {PolicyNumber} - {PolicyName} - {CorporationName} - {PolicyEffectiveDate}

sampleData.note: Dummy data for export preview and PDF/source comparison only. Do not treat these values as imported organization facts.

values.MotionText: the attached policy be approved and added to the society records

renderedSample.html:
Donation Recording and Receipting Policy

Organization: Sample Community Society

Policy number: DON-001

Effective date: 2026-01-01

This is a Societyer starter template remade from imported source material. Review it for your jurisdiction, bylaws, funder requirements, charity status, and actual operations before adoption.

Receipt Authority

Official donation receipts are issued only after the gift has become the legal property of the organization and the required gift information is complete.

Receipt Information

  • Donor name and address.
  • Organization legal name, address, and charitable registration number where applicable.
  • Date received and eligible amount.
  • Description and valuation support for gifts in kind.
  • Any required regulatory statements or website references.

Records

Receipt copies, designation evidence, valuation support, and special event calculations are retained for the required retention period and linked to the applicable fund or donor record.

Monitoring

This policy will be reviewed on or around 2027-01-01 and whenever legal, operational, funding, or governance requirements materially change.

Board Acceptance

This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors of Sample Community Society on 2026-01-01.

Approved by counterpart signatures of the voting directors.

Chair
_________________________________________
Avery Chen
Treasurer
_________________________________________
Morgan Patel

Source: DonationRecordingAndReceipting.pdf; SHA-256 b8e1853b32d80217b227a1c4eb9f057cab239a8c1bdf327c5fc0276ccafc22b5
